## Purpose / 用途

<!-- Describe what this subdomain or DNS change will be used for. / 请说明这个子域名或 DNS 变更的用途。 -->


## Abuse Prevention Agreement / 防滥用承诺

- [ ] I will not use `baka.life` subdomains for phishing, malware, spam, abuse, or illegal services. / 我不会将 `baka.life` 子域名用于钓鱼、恶意软件、垃圾信息、滥用或非法服务。
- [ ] I will not impersonate others or publish misleading services. / 我不会冒充他人或发布误导性服务。
- [ ] I will not resell or transfer the requested subdomain as a commercial product. / 我不会将申请的子域名作为商业产品转售或转让。
- [ ] I understand maintainers may reject or remove records that violate the project rules. / 我理解维护者可以拒绝或移除违反项目规则的记录。
